message:
Improve Discord release notification formatting

- Demote ## headers to ### for better visual hierarchy (embed title
  should be most prominent, not section headers)
- Generate release notes on-the-fly with --explicit-links flag for
  clickable @author and #PR references
- Detect new releases by directory instead of notes.md file presence

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 #!/usr/bin/env python3
 """Discord notification script for changelog entries and releases."""
 
+import re
 from pathlib import Path
 
 import click
@@ -93,6 +94,15 @@ def strip_leading_heading(text: str) -> str:
     return text
 
 
+def demote_headers(text: str) -> str:
+    """Demote ## headers to ### for better visual hierarchy in Discord.
+
+    Discord renders ## headers very prominently, often larger than the embed
+    title. Demoting to ### keeps section structure while respecting hierarchy.
+    """
+    return re.sub(r"^## ", "### ", text, flags=re.MULTILINE)
+
+
 def truncate(text: str, max_length: int = 4000) -> str:
     """Truncate text to fit Discord's embed limits."""
     if len(text) <= max_length:
@@ -172,6 +182,7 @@ def release(project: str, version: str, notes_file: Path, webhook_url: str):
 
     notes = notes_file.read_text()
     notes = strip_leading_heading(notes)
+    notes = demote_headers(notes)
     notes = truncate(notes, 3800)
 
     url = f"https://github.com/{repo}/releases/tag/{version}"

@@ -83,12 +83,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Snapshot existing files
         id: snapshot
         run: |
-          # Record existing unreleased entries and release notes before sync
+          # Record existing unreleased entries and releases before sync
           # Only track unreleased/ - entries in releases/*/entries/ are archived
           # copies that were already notified when they were unreleased
           find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" -path "*/unreleased/*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/entries-before.txt || true
           # Only track top-level releases, not module releases
-          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog/releases" -name "notes.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-before.txt || true
+          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog/releases" -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-before.txt || true
 
       - name: Sync changelog
         run: |
@@ -137,17 +137,19 @@ jobs:
       - name: Notify Discord of new releases
         if: env.DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK != '' && !inputs.skip_notifications
         run: |
-          # Find new top-level release notes (not module releases)
-          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog/releases" -name "notes.md" 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-after.txt || true
+          # Find new top-level releases (not module releases)
+          find "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog/releases" -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | sort > /tmp/releases-after.txt || true
           comm -13 /tmp/releases-before.txt /tmp/releases-after.txt > /tmp/new-releases.txt || true
 
           # Send notification for each new release
-          while IFS= read -r notes_file; do
-            [[ -z "$notes_file" ]] && continue
-            # Extract version from path (e.g., project/changelog/releases/v1.0.0/notes.md -> v1.0.0)
-            version=$(echo "$notes_file" | sed -n 's|.*/releases/\([^/]*\)/notes.md|\1|p')
+          while IFS= read -r release_dir; do
+            [[ -z "$release_dir" ]] && continue
+            version=$(basename "$release_dir")
             echo "Notifying Discord about new release: ${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }} $version"
-            python .github/scripts/discord-notify.py release "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" "$version" "$notes_file" "$DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK" || true
+            # Generate notes with explicit links for Discord
+            uvx tenzir-changelog --root "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}/changelog" \
+              release notes --explicit-links "$version" > /tmp/notes.md
+            python .github/scripts/discord-notify.py release "${{ steps.resolve.outputs.dir }}" "$version" /tmp/notes.md "$DISCORD_RELEASE_WEBHOOK" || true
             sleep 1  # Rate limiting
           done < /tmp/new-releases.txt
